product_page.title_descriptor: Pa6.6 woven high visible fabric for Police and Gendarme wear
product_page.page_title: Pa6.6 woven high visible fabric for Police and Gendarme wear - ArDura 500 C Neo - Ariteks
product_page.spec_line: 215 g/m², 100% Pa 6.6, Water Repellent, Antibacterial, High Visible Woven Fabric
description_blocks: ArDura 500 C Neo is lightweight high visible 100% polyamide 6.6 woven fabric for military, police and gendarme wear. It is suitable for mobile motobikers police wear.
The Pa6.6 high tenacity fibers gives for extra protection for polices.
The fabric has water and oil repellent function.
It's used mostly for application which requires ultra durability.
The antibacterial function is very usefull to eliminate all kind of odor formation during work.

images.title: Package Technical Textiles
images.context_text: High Tenacity Polyamide Fabrics (PA6.6) for Military bags, motorcyclist clothing and workwear fabrics. Pa6.6 fabrics has high tenacity and friction resistance.

images.title: Pa 6.6 Woven
images.context_text: ArDura 500 C Neo is lightweight high visible 100% polyamide 6.6 woven fabric for military, police and gendarme wear. It is suitable for mobile motobikers police wear. The Pa6.6 high tenacity fibers gives for extra protection for polices. The fabric has water and oil repellent function. It's used mostly for application which requires ultra durability. The antibacterial function is very usefull to eliminate all kind of odor formation during work. It is EN 20471 certified.

215 g/m² , 100% Pa 6.6, Water Repellent, Antibacterial, High Visible Woven Fabric

ArDura 500 C Neo is lightweight high visible 100% polyamide 6.6 woven fabric for military, police and gendarme wear. It is suitable for mobile motobikers police wear. The Pa6.6 high tenacity fibers gives for extra protection for polices. The fabric has water and oil repellent function. It's used mostly for application which requires ultra durability. The antibacterial function is very usefull to eliminate all kind of odor formation during work. It is EN 20471 certified.
